text.title: React Component Architecture Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of React Component Architecture. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: `<Button>` imports auth check; every feature touches Button to add a use case.
antipattern.fix: Extract to feature wrapper `<CheckoutButton>` that composes `<Button>`; primitive stays generic.

antipattern.symptom: Updating cart count re-renders the entire app; profiler shows 200 components.
antipattern.fix: Move cart to Zustand store; Context only carries identity (cart id), not contents.

antipattern.symptom: Filter UI flickers; double-render on every keystroke.
antipattern.root-cause: useEffect derives filtered list from props.
antipattern.fix: Derive on render with useMemo only if profiling shows cost.

antipattern.symptom: App slower after wrapping every component in memo + useCallback.
antipattern.fix: Remove memo from leaf components; keep only where child is memoised AND parent re-renders frequently.
